title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 7–9, this part follows Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The mythological dragon- dragon fruit...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It is said that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Whoever eats it can transform into the world's most colossal dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The size of the creature is relative to the initial size of whoever ate the fruit, of course.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think of it this way, a giant would grow larger than a human undergoing the same transformation, and an ancient giant's growth is naturally even greater than that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That combination is what brings out the Devil Fruit's true potential.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They say this dragon breathes lighting, and when it flies, its jet-black body can turn day into night.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So the fruit was forbidden and hidden due to its immense power?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Not quite... it's just been protected...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: by the hammer guardian...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...RAGNIR!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In Elbaf, there is a legend about a "God of War"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...who fought with RAGNR,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is said that he took the form of a giant dragon and he locked horns with the "Sun God".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was accompanied by a loyal partner, the ice squirrel, ratatoskr.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: to make a long story short...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After his master died, they say the loyal ratatoskr...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...came to possess the weapon, ragnir...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and awaits his master's return...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...or so the legend goes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: but it seems RAGNIR...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...is no longer acting as a guard for the fruit's power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's finally made its choice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It chose LOK!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: POAARP!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
